MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Hunter Pyle/Noreen Farrell, for Plaintiff/Moving party
Phillip Shinn, for Defendant/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum is granted. The subpoenas are overly broad. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Further Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories & First Set Of Inspection Demands; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Hunter Pyle/Noreen Farrell, for Plaintiff/Moving party
Phillip Shinn, for Defendant/Opposing party

RULING:
Hearing held. Ruling after hearing: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Lori's Diner International Inc. And JT Cheon Enterprises, Inc. To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories: As to Interrogatories, limited in time to 1996 to present, the Mason Street, Sutter Street, Powell St. locations. Limited to complaint of sexual harassment and racial discrimination.
As to Documents Production, redactions may be made for names of complainants and witnesses with the exception of persons named in the complaint production and respond further by June 10, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2005 Set For Trial On Nov-14-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-26-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 611
